backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing user profiles, coin balances, deposit requests, tournament management with join requests and match info, access control with permanent admin email, and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old user profiles to new format by adding principal field to existing userId, email, and name data.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of frontend components including routing, hooks, pages, admin panels, and UI components for the TN FF BATTLE gaming platform.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, destructive, borders, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, title 'TN FF BATTLE', root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup for 8 routes (home, login, dashboard, wallet, tournament, admin, tournament-admin, deposit-admin), QueryClient provider, InternetIdentity provider, theme provider, layout wrapper with profile setup modal, and loading states.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Access denied screen component displaying shield alert icon, error message for unauthorized admin panel access, and button to navigate back to dashboard.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminPassw: Admin authentication guard component that checks session storage for admin role, verifies with backend isCallerAdmin call, handles actor availability errors with retry, and shows loading/verification states before rendering protected children.
frontend/src/components/admin/DepositPas: Authentication guard component that verifies admin privileges via backend actor call before granting access to deposit management features, with session storage persistence and detailed logging.
frontend/src/components/admin/DepositVer: Displays pending deposit requests in a table with approve/reject actions, showing user ID, amount, and timestamp for each request.
frontend/src/components/admin/DirectDepo: Admin interface for directly depositing coins to user accounts with user search/selection and transaction history tabs.
frontend/src/components/admin/JoinReques: Displays tournament join requests in a searchable table showing user UID, Free Fire UID, WhatsApp number, entry fee, and join timestamp.
frontend/src/components/admin/MatchManag: Admin interface for creating and updating tournament matches with player UID, WhatsApp number, and match time, including search and dialog-based forms.
frontend/src/components/admin/Tournament: Admin panel for configuring tournament settings including entry status toggle, entry fee, match count, and match time with actor availability checks.
Authentication guard component that verifies admin access using Internet Identity and session storage, with detailed logging and retry functionality for actor connection issues.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserManage: Admin component displaying a searchable table of all registered users with their ID, name, and email using the useGetAllUsers hook.
frontend/src/components/common/GamingBut: Reusable button component with gaming-themed styling, supporting three variants (primary, secondary, danger) and three sizes (sm, md, lg) with gradient backgrounds and glow effects.
frontend/src/components/common/GamingCar: Card container component with gaming aesthetics featuring optional glow effects (orange/cyan), backdrop blur, and decorative corner accents.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Main layout wrapper providing navigation, footer with URL copy functionality, and a battle-themed background overlay for the entire application.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: Navigation bar component with responsive mobile menu, authentication controls, and links to dashboard/wallet/tournament sections with admin badge and pending deposits indicator.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup collecting name and email, includes principal from identity, submits UserProfile with userId 0 to backend via useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profile, balance, deposits, tournaments, matches, and admin operations (pending deposits, join requests, direct deposits). Includes mutation hooks with toast notifications and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useRetryConnection.ts: Provides a retry mechanism with exponential backoff for connection failures, tracking retry state and offering manual retry via page reload.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for a Free Fire-themed dark gaming UI, including background images, overlays, and color schemes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page with role validation, featuring tabs for user management, deposit verification, tournament config, join requests, match management, and direct deposits. Includes password guard and access control.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: User dashboard displaying profile info, wallet balance, and tournament status with navigation to wallet management.
frontend/src/pages/DepositAdminPage.tsx: Dedicated admin page for deposit management and user management, with backend role validation and password guard protection.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page component displaying hero section with Free Fire branding, feature cards (tournaments, deposits, security, leaderboards), and call-to-action buttons that vary based on authentication status.
frontend/src/pages/LoginRegister.tsx: Login/registration page that uses Internet Identity for authentication, automatically redirects authenticated users to dashboard, and displays welcome message with feature list for new users.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentAdminPage.t: Admin dashboard page that validates admin role against backend on mount, uses session storage for role caching, and displays tabbed interface for match management, join requests, and tournament configuration behind a password guard.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentPage.tsx: Tournament join page displaying tournament status (open/closed), entry fee, user balance, and a form to submit Free Fire UID and WhatsApp number with validation for sufficient balance.
frontend/src/pages/WalletDeposit.tsx: Wallet deposit page that validates actor availability, displays user balance, accepts deposit amounts (₹5-₹100), shows UPI payment details after submission, and includes comprehensive error handling with connection retry logic.
frontend/src/utils/errorMessages.ts: Error categorization utility that analyzes error messages to provide user-friendly titles, descriptions, and actionable suggestions for connection, authentication, timeout, and deposit-specific errors.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with gaming-focused fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron), custom shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document defining pending feature requests for implementing permanent admin role assignment based on hardcoded email 'niranjanniranjan88464@gmail.com'.
